Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL).. ✓

Albania.notes: ID card valid.. 90 days within 180 days.. ✓

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days.. ✓

Angola.notes: 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only.. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required.. ✓

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area. ✓

Bahamas.notes: Visa not required for permanent residents of the United States or Canada.. Cruise ship passengers travelling to and returning from the Bahamas do not require to obtain visa for entry. Both entry and departure must be by a cruise ship.. X

Bangladesh.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Belize.notes: Permanent residents of the US and Canada and holders of valid visas of the US, Canada, Schengen Area and the UK do not require a visa.. ✓

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR).. X

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD.. ✓

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 90 days within any 6-month period.. ID card valid.. ✓

Botswana.notes: 300 Botswana Pula for single entry for a period up to 3 months,500 Botswana Pula for multiple entry for a period up to 3 months,1500 Pula for multiple entry for a period over 3 months up to 2 years for dependants of residents.. x

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Burundi.notes: Citizens of all countries that needed visas can now apply for an visa on arrival at Bujumbura International Airport, or at all land borders.. X

Canada.notes: Visa not required for permanent residents of the United States.. X

Cape Verde.notes: Not available at all entry points. Passengers who register with pre-registration (EASE), will not pay additional fee at arrival.. X

Chad.notes: Passengers with an Entry Authorization letter issued by the authorities of Chad before departure can obtain a visa on arrival.. ✓

Republic of the Congo.notes: Passengers with a special entry authorization can obtain a visa on arrival. The entry authorization must be signed by the Minister of Interior and Decentralization and by the Director General of Territorial Surveillance. Also passengers with V.I.P. invitation letter are exempt from visa.. ✓

Democratic Republic of the Congo.notes: Passengers with a letter (Visa Volant) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 7 days. They can apply to extend their stay.. ✓

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport.. X

El Salvador.notes: Nationals of Serbia with a valid visa issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member State are exempted from visa.. ✓

Equatorial Guinea.notes: Must arrive via Malabo International Airport, processing fee USD 75. x

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. X

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport. *Passengers with an entry authorization issued by immigration before departure can obtain a visa on arrival.. X

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Guatemala.notes: Not required for holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member State.. ✓

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.. X

Ireland.notes: Visa is issued free of charge.. Visa waiver for UK 'C' visa holders. Entry permitted only if first point of entry to the Common Travel Area is in the UK.. X

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Japan.notes: Visa not required for visits up to 90 days using the Serbian biometric passports according of Here.. ✓

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ). X

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. ✓

South Korea.notes: The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval.. ✓

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings.. X

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Lebanon.notes: Extendable for 2 additional months.. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket.. X

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD.. X

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Mexico.notes: Visa not required for holders of valid visa issued by the US, Canada, Japan, the UK, or any of the countries comprising the Schengen Area, or for holders of valid permanent resident card from Canada, Chile, Colombia, Japan, Peru, the US, the UK or any of the countries comprising the Schengen Area.. Visa is also issued free of charge for Serbian citizens.. X

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand – Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India – Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa is available for tourism only.. X

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

New Zealand.notes: Collective passports issued by the former Federal Republic of Yugoslavia are unacceptable, and visas will not be endorsed in them.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.. X

Nicaragua.notes: Not required for holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, the USA or a Schengen Member State.. X

North Macedonia.notes: ID card valid.. 90 days within 180 days.. ✓

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category.. ✓

Philippines.notes: Residents of the United Arab Emirates may obtain an eVisa through the official Philippine eVisa website. A valid Emirati residence visa must be shown upon an eVisa application.. ✓

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Russia.notes: For a maximum total stay of 90 days within one calendar year period.. ✓

Saudi Arabia.notes: Holders of a US, UK or Schengen visas have been eligible for a Saudi e-Visa upon arrival.. ✓

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.. ✓

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.. X

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.. ✓

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. ✓

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points.. X

Tunisia.notes: Travelers traveling as a group may obtain a visa on arrival.. ✓

Turkmenistan.notes: 10-day visa on arrival if holding a letter of invitation provided by a company registered in Turkmenistan with a prior approval from the Foreign Ministry. Visitors can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days.. When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD.. ✓

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry.. X

United Kingdom.notes: Serbian citizens who hold a valid entry visa for Australia, Canada, New Zealand or the United States, and a valid airline ticket for travel via the United Kingdom, as part of a journey to or from one of those countries and/or are permanent residents of the European Union, Australia, Canada and New Zealand do not require a Direct Airside Transit visa.. X

Venezuela.notes: On July 14, 2023, a visa waiver agreement was signed between the two countries, and both national parliaments ratified it in 2023 and 2025.. ✓

Vietnam.notes: 30 days visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island.. X

Yemen.notes: Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.).. ✓

Abkhazia.stay: Tourists from all countries (except Georgia) can visit Abkhazia for a period not exceeding 24 hours as part of an organized tourist group..

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: 25 euro for Orthodox visitors, 35 euro for non-Orthodox visitors, 18 euro for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed..

Crimea.stay: Territory accessed under Russian visa policy..

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.stay: Access Permit is required for travelling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas..

Kosovo.stay: 90 days; ID card valid. A registration at the nearest Police station is required within 72h of entry into the republic of Kosovo..

Jan Mayen.stay: Permit issued by the local police required for staying for less than 24 hours. and permit issued by the Norwegian police for staying for more than 24 hours..

South Ossetia.stay: To enter South Ossetia, visitors must have a multiple-entry visa for Russia and register their stay with the Migration Service of the Ministry of Internal Affairs within 3 days..

Transnistria.stay: Visitors must complete and obtain a temporary migration card at the border checkpoint. The maximum period of stay is 45 days, and it can be extended multiple times through this card..

Eritrea outside Asmara.stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa )..

Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic.stay: Undefined visa regime in the Western Sahara controlled territory..

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands..

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez..

Hong Kong SAR, China.stay: 14 days; Only the passport with biometric cover..

India PAP/RAP.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year..

Kish Island.stay: 14 days; Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa..

Iraqi Kurdistan.stay: Before applying for a visa, applicants must complete the application form to obtain a sponsor code and then provide this code to a sponsor in Kurdistan.. Once the sponsor code is provided, the sponsor applies for the e-Visa, pays the fee, and notifies the applicant of the application results.. Visa exempt for those who were born in Iraq.. e-Visa for 30 days is available at Erbil and Sulaymaniyah airports..

North Korea outside Pyongyang.stay: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving).

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed..

French West Indies.stay: 90 days; includes overseas departments of Guadeloupe and Martinique and overseas collectivities of Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa-free and landing fee USD 35 or tax of USD 5 if not going ashore..

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Atoll, Palmyra Atoll and Wake Island..

Galápagos.stay: 60 days; Visitors must pre-register to receive a 20 USD Transit Control Card (TCT)..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling )..

Antarctica.stay: Special permits required for British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency..
